data.body: CHECKPOINT 2 (2026-07-13). EPIC f1fa: closed+signed = 38be(S5d), ea61(S5b), 0525(S3), 0ee8(S2). Landed: #624/#626/#627 + #641(S5d/S5b test/comment completion) + #643(dc33 v1 annotation/store). Bot redeployed, healthy, alarm OK. REMAINING: 3c55(S5) + epic f1fa held pending dc33 completion. ALARM ROOT CAUSE (rebar-autolander-errors): bot LANDED #642 fine (agent set Autosubmit, walked away - real dogfood) but post-merge ticket annotation paged. dc33 v1 provisioned a tickets store but the boot clone came up BROKEN (0 commits, empty; entrypoint masked the failure; never self-heals) + clone-once goes stale. dc33 v2 (branch fix-dc33-freshen, subagent a63ad112 implementing): close_ticket_via_rebar freshens store (fetch+reset+run_ensures, re-clone if needed) before rebar.comment -> self-heals broken clone + keeps current. Paging: unset REBAR_TRACKER_DIR pages; transient refresh fail = non-paging skip; comment fail on fresh store pages. NEXT: land dc33 v2 -> redeploy -> functional-verify a real annotation works + alarm stays OK (dc33 operator-attested AC) -> close dc33 -> close 3c55(S5) -> close epic f1fa. Bug 0d3e (Autosubmit dropped on bot rebase) still filed future work. Close from ~/rebar-autolander/.venv/bin/rebar (agents extra). Gerrit submit as RebarBotNava; FFO rebase on 409.
